ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay, specially appearing for Gilbert Jay, for Jack Woo, Personal Representative.

Mr. Jay advises that he has no substantial update for the court and apologizes for the delay and reports of the intent to file a petition for termination soon.

The Status hearing is continued to Dec-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Nov-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay, via Zoom, for Jack Woo, Personal Representative.

Mr. Jay advises that nothing remains in the estate. The court confirms with Mr. Jay that he intends to file a petition to close the estate for lack of assets.

The matter is continued to Nov-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 8, 2015, is admitted to probate. Jack Woo is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 25, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
